name: Cashbuild Limited
summary: Cashbuild Limited retails building materials and associated products. The company offers cement, timber, bricks, roof coverings, and decorative products. It serves contractors, homebuilders and improvers, farmers, traders, and other customers. As of June 30, 2020, the company operated 318 stores, including 256 Cashbuild stores, 61 P&L Hardware stores, and 1 DIY stores in South Africa, Botswana, Swaziland, Lesotho, Namibia, Malawi, and Zambia. Cashbuild Limited was founded in 1978 and is based in Johannesburg, South Africa.
